# Napkin Runbook

## Curation Rules

- Re-prioritize on every read.
- Keep recurring, high-value notes only.
- Max 10 items per category.
- Each item includes date + "Do instead".

## Execution & Validation (Highest Priority)

1. **[2026-05-07] Validate the touched slice immediately after the first real edit**
   Do instead: run the narrowest available lint, type, or behavior check before widening scope.

## UI Implementation Guardrails

1. **[2026-05-07] Preserve DESIGN.md tokens instead of inventing new visual values inline**
   Do instead: centralize motion, shadows, and interactive states in shared CSS or tokens and reuse them across components.

2. **[2026-05-07] Keep landing UI localized when redesigning**
   Do instead: reuse existing translation keys or add keys across all locales before adding new visible copy.
